message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam backgroundColor black
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor #4aa3c7
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  LifeLineBorderThickness 2
  ActorBorderColor #4aa3c7
  ActorFontColor white
  ParticipantBorderColor #4aa3c7
  ParticipantFontColor black
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #bfe3f2
  EntityBorderColor #4aa3c7
  EntityBackgroundColor #fffbd6
  ControlBorderColor #4aa3c7
  ControlBackgroundColor #e6e6e6
  BoundaryBorderColor #4aa3c7
  BoundaryBackgroundColor #bfe3f2
  ArrowColor white
  ArrowFontColor white
  MessageAlign center
}
skinparam defaultFontName Arial

actor " " as A #transparent

boundary "«boundary»\nZMDomačaStran" as ZM
control "«control»\nKrmilnikNovica" as KN
control "«control»\nKrmilnikPredloga" as KP
control "«control»\nKrmilnikDogodek" as KD
entity "«entity»\nPredlogProjekta" as PP #fffbd6
entity "«entity»\nNovica" as N #fffbd6
boundary "«boundary»\nSVGoogleCalendar\nAPI" as GCal

activate KN
deactivate KN

activate KP
deactivate KP

activate KD
deactivate KD

activate ZM
deactivate ZM

activate ZM
deactivate ZM

activate KD
deactivate KD

activate KD
activate KD
deactivate KD
deactivate KD

activate PP
deactivate PP

activate N
deactivate N

activate GCal
deactivate GCal

activate GCal
deactivate GCal
@enduml
